findings.description: Source contains a note explaining that `doRW11AC0201` is the initial display handler for the user registration screen (`doRW11AC0201メソッドは、ユーザ情報登録画面を初期表示する処理`). This note provides context for why `@OnError` forwards to `path = "forward://RW11AC0201"` in the code example, but is absent from the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence:
.. note::
  doRW11AC0201メソッドは、ユーザ情報登録画面を初期表示する処理。
